etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "envy" from Old French "envie" from Latin "invidia" (ill will)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Ill will; experiencing jealous resentment and envy bitterness supported by healing awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Ill will → jealous resentment → contemporary envy bitterness and envy resentment that benefits from compassion growth

contemporary_usage.register: Serious negative; indicates resentment supported by healing awareness intervention and compassion support
contemporary_usage.raw_content:
